# nakupovanie.sk / nakupovani.cz

Premium domain acquisition hub for:
- companies
- e-commerce groups
- marketplace operators
- media-commerce hybrids
- strategic buyers

## Human pages
- /sk
- /cz
- /en
- /verify.html
- /ai-trust-hub.html

## Machine endpoints
- /.well-known/ai-trust-hub.json
- /.well-known/llms.txt
- /.well-known/minisign.pub
- /.well-known/key-history.json
- /.well-known/search-discovery.json
- /dumps/sha256.json
- /dumps/sigs/sha256.json.minisig

## Summary
This site presents a closed corporate acquisition flow for the pair:
- nakupovanie.sk
- nakupovani.cz

The project includes:
- company registration form
- immediate purchase after registration
- closed bidding process
- TFWS 2.0 trust scaffold
- simple admin panel
- search discovery manifest for agent ingestion
